meaning: n.曼哈顿岛(美国纽约一区)
examples: Manhattan is divided into distinct neighborhoods.
Auditions will be held at the Manhattan Playhouse.
Weekenders from Manhattan enjoy restaurants in the Hudson River Valley.
Prime office space in that part of Manhattan sells to yield 5.5% to 6%.
To get there from Manhattan, hop the Staten Island Ferry from Whitehall Terminal.
